CustomField.description: Internal engine field. Stores pipe-delimited 6-character prefixes of each ancestor Metadata_Id__c value as a fast pre-screen index for cycle detection. Before running the expensive full Ancestor_Path__c containment check, the engine checks this index. A match triggers the conclusive full-string check; no match skips it entirely. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Ancestor ID Prefix Index
